title: foxglove.JointState
description: State of a set of joints. Each joint is uniquely identified by its name. All non-empty arrays should have the same length.

timestamp.title: time
timestamp.description: Timestamp of the joint state data

position.description: Joint positions in radians (revolute) or meters (prismatic)

velocity.description: Joint velocities in rad/s (revolute) or m/s (prismatic)

effort.description: Joint efforts in Nm (revolute) or N (prismatic)
